Get in touch
Beware of fraudsters impersonating CoinCover. We will never cold-call you and ask for your personal information. Email support@coincover.com if you ever have any concerns.

Secure your customers' crypto assets

Whether it’s keeping transactions safe or ensuring your customers always have access to their assets, trust the experts.

Get in touch
TRUSTED BY

500+

Protected businesses

$48bn

Of risk mitigated

22m

Wallets protected

500+

Protected businesses

$48bn

Of risk mitigated

22m

Wallets protected

Protect your customers' wallets by joining the largest protected community in crypto

When the worst happens, help your customers recover access to their assets. Fast.

ReCOVER is your ultra-fast backup plan for when your customers lose access to their crypto assets. Ensure peace of mind 24/7 that your customers will never lose access to their wallets.
Protect your customers' transactions in real-time with our advanced threat detection.

Advanced risk screening through AssetCOVER ensures your customers’ wallets and crypto transactions are safe and secure. We double our protection by both monitoring for suspicious activity 24/7, as well as guarding each transaction against a blocklist of malicious wallets - with all validated transactions backed by our full warranty. Our proprietary blocklist is one of the largest in the industry, ensuring you’ll always be alerted in real-time of risks.
When the worst happens, help your customers recover access to their assets. Fast.
Read more Read less

ReCOVER is your ultra-fast backup plan for when your customers lose access to their crypto assets. Ensure peace of mind 24/7 that your customers will never lose access to their wallets.

Protect your customers' transactions in real-time with our advanced threat detection.
Read more Read less

Advanced risk screening through AssetCOVER ensures your customers’ wallets and crypto transactions are safe and secure. We double our protection by both monitoring for suspicious activity 24/7, as well as guarding each transaction against a blocklist of malicious wallets - with all validated transactions backed by our full warranty. Our proprietary blocklist is one of the largest in the industry, ensuring you’ll always be alerted in real-time of risks.

Are you protected?

When the worst happens, our experts can help recover access to your assets.

Chat to an expert by booking a meeting now

Book a meeting

Billions protected, millions saved

Real-time threat detection

Stop threats and prevent losses
before they occur.

Certified protection

Published verification that CoinCover is in place for you and your customers.

Multi-region coverage

Coverage where you, your regulator and your customers operate (excluding UK & US sanctioned countries).

Backup health checks

Provides validated proof to regulators and assurance to you.

Major cryptocurrencies covered

We protect most major cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin (BTC), Ether (ETH) and all ERC-20 standard tokens.

Never lose access

Our encrypted military-grade storage helps your customers rapidly and securely recover what's theirs.

Tailored to your needs

Defence for the risks that truly matter to you and your customers.

Analytics

Harnessing the best threat intelligence and unique usage insights.

Flexible coverage levels

Flexible coverage to market movements so that you only protect what your customers need.

Real-time threat detection

Stop threats and prevent losses
before they occur.

Certified protection

Published verification that CoinCover is in place for you and your customers.

Multi-region coverage

Coverage where you, your regulator and your customers operate (excluding UK & US sanctioned countries).

Backup health checks

Provides validated proof to regulators and assurance to you.

Major cryptocurrencies covered

We protect most major cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin (BTC), Ether (ETH) and all ERC-20 standard tokens.

Never lose access

Our encrypted military-grade storage helps your customers rapidly and securely recover what's theirs.

Tailored to your needs

Defence for the risks that truly matter to you and your customers.

Analytics

Harnessing the best threat intelligence and unique usage insights.

Flexible coverage levels

Flexible coverage to market movements so that you only protect what your customers need.

Mitigating risks associated with blockchain assets

Lost access

Eliminate single points of failure and benefit from a secure, non-custodial recovery solution.

Cyber threats

Fortify defences against malicious attacks such as account takeovers, ransomware, and social engineering.

Human error

Safeguard against sending funds to the wrong account, corrupt or deleted access material, and other common mistakes. 

Lost access

Eliminate single points of failure and benefit from a secure, non-custodial recovery solution.

Cyber threats

Fortify defences against malicious attacks such as account takeovers, ransomware, and social engineering.

Human error

Safeguard against sending funds to the wrong account, corrupt or deleted access material, and other common mistakes. 

Going beyond insurance in Blockchain and creating a new category of protection

ENTRY LEVEL

Core

  • One platform
  • Basic alerts
  • Quarterly reporting
  • 96 hour recovery SLA
  • Ransomware
  • Lost seed phrase
  • 2FA back up
  • Damaged or stolen device
  • Wallet provider / Custody failure

Get Started
MOST POPULAR

Advanced

  • Up to 3 platforms
  • Custom alerts
  • Monthly reporting
  • Proof of protection certificate
  • 48 hour recovery SLA
Includes all Core features plus:
  • Whaling
  • Sim swap
  • Fat finger (mistyped address)
  • Spear phishing
  • Man in the middle
  • Internal bad actors
  • Brute force attack
  • Biometric security failure
  • Multi-factor security failure

Get Started
BEST COVERAGE

Complete

  • Up to 5 platforms
  • Advanced alerts
  • Live reporting
  • Proof of protection certificate
  • 24 hour recovery SLA
Includes all Core and Advanced features plus:
  • Exit scams
  • Human error
  • Social engineering
  • Address poisoning
  • Supply chain hacks
  • Account takeover (ATO)
  • Staked key assets access
  • Insolvency crypto assets access

Get Started

Protected assets

We protect most major cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin (BTC), Ether (ETH) and ERC-20 standard tokens.

CoinCover’s risk engine technology is insured so that if a protected transaction turns out to be malicious, we are able to compensate our customers. This is the CoinCover guarantee. CoinCover itself does not provide insurance coverage for assets or operations.
 
Digital Asset Services Ltd (trading as CoinCover) is incorporated in England and Wales with registered number 11356137 whose registered office is at Capital Building, Tyndall Street, Cardiff, Wales, CF10 4AZ.
